# afterprime.com llms.txt

> Afterprime is a forex and CFD broker providing institutional-grade trading
> conditions to retail and professional traders. The site includes a
> comprehensive forex/CFD glossary, broker comparison tools, trading hours data,
> swap rate pages, market analysis, calculators, and platform documentation.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://afterprime.com/) -- Overview of Afterprime broker services, account types, and featured content. (priority: 1.0)
- [AI Instructions](https://afterprime.com/ai-instructions) -- AI-specific usage instructions for interacting with Afterprime content. (priority: 0.8)
- [Glossary Index](https://afterprime.com/glossary/) -- Full A-Z glossary of forex and CFD trading terms. (priority: 0.8)
- [Forex Trading](https://afterprime.com/forex/) -- Overview of forex trading services and supported currency pairs. (priority: 0.8)
- [Markets - Metals](https://afterprime.com/markets/metals/) -- Precious metals trading overview (XAU/USD, XAG/USD, etc.). (priority: 0.8)
- [Why We Exist](https://afterprime.com/why-we-exist) -- Mission and founding story. (priority: 0.8)
- [Our Story](https://afterprime.com/our-story) -- Company background and timeline. (priority: 0.8)
- [How to Qualify](https://afterprime.com/how-to-qualify) -- Eligibility requirements for Afterprime accounts. (priority: 0.8)
- [Get Paid to Trade](https://afterprime.com/get-paid-to-trade) -- Cashback and loyalty rewards program details. (priority: 0.8)
- [Future of Trading](https://afterprime.com/future-of-trading) -- Thought leadership on the evolution of retail trading. (priority: 0.8)
- [Lowest Cost Verified](https://afterprime.com/lowest-cost-verified) -- Evidence-based cost comparison claims. (priority: 0.8)
- [Aligned Execution](https://afterprime.com/aligned-execution) -- Execution quality and conflict-of-interest disclosure. (priority: 0.8)
- [Trade Execution](https://afterprime.com/trade-execution) -- Order execution policy and infrastructure. (priority: 0.8)
- [Margins and Leverages](https://afterprime.com/margins-and-leverages) -- Margin requirements and leverage ratios by asset class. (priority: 0.8)
- [Swaps](https://afterprime.com/swaps/) -- Overview of overnight financing charges. (priority: 0.8)
- [Deposit & Withdrawal](https://afterprime.com/deposit-withdrawal) -- Funding methods, fees, and processing times. (priority: 0.8)
- [KYC/AML](https://afterprime.com/kyc-aml) -- Know Your Customer and Anti-Money Laundering policies. (priority: 0.8)
- [License and Regulations](https://afterprime.com/license-and-regulations) -- Regulatory status and licensing information. (priority: 0.8)
- [Legal Documents](https://afterprime.com/legal-documents) -- Terms of service, PDS, and legal agreements. (priority: 0.8)
- [Privacy Policy](https://afterprime.com/privacy/) -- Data handling and privacy practices. (priority: 0.8)
- [Cookie Policy](https://afterprime.com/cookies/) -- Cookie usage and consent information. (priority: 0.8)
- [Terms](https://afterprime.com/terms/) -- General terms and conditions. (priority: 0.8)
- [Contact Us](https://afterprime.com/contact-us/) -- Customer support contact information. (priority: 0.8)
- [What Traders Say](https://afterprime.com/what-traders-say/) -- Trader testimonials and reviews. (priority: 0.8)
- [Our Discord](https://afterprime.com/our-discord/) -- Community Discord server link. (priority: 0.8)
- [Trade](https://afterprime.com/trade/) -- Live trading account registration gateway. (priority: 0.8)
- [WebTrader MT4](https://afterprime.com/webtrader-mt4/) -- Browser-based MT4 platform access. (priority: 0.9)
- [WebTrader MT4 Demo](https://afterprime.com/webtrader-mt4-demo/) -- MT4 demo account registration. (priority: 0.9)
- [WebTrader MT5](https://afterprime.com/webtrader-mt5/) -- Browser-based MT5 platform access. (priority: 0.9)

## Glossary (108 terms)

Forex and CFD trading term definitions, each at /glossary/{term}.

- [Account Balance](https://afterprime.com/glossary/account-balance)
- [All-In Cost](https://afterprime.com/glossary/all-in-cost)
- [AML](https://afterprime.com/glossary/aml)
- [Arbitrage](https://afterprime.com/glossary/arbitrage)

## Trade pages (59 instruments)

Each at /trade/{pair} -- live trading interface and instrument-specific details.

- [XAU/USD](https://afterprime.com/trade/xauusd)
- Plus 58 additional currency pair and instrument trade pages.

## Trading hours (112 instruments)

Each at /trading-hours/{pair} -- session times, market open/close, and holiday schedules.

- [VIX](https://afterprime.com/trading-hours/vix)

## Swap rates (112 instruments)

Each at /swaps/{pair} -- overnight and triple swap rates for long and short positions.

### Major forex pairs
- [AUD/CAD](https://afterprime.com/swaps/audcad)
- [AUD/CHF](https://afterprime.com/swaps/audchf)
- [AUD/JPY](https://afterprime.com/swaps/audjpy)

## Broker comparison pages (708 pages)

Three comparison categories:

### vs Industry Average
- [Overview](https://afterprime.com/vs/industry-avg) -- Afterprime spread comparison vs industry average across all instruments.
- Per-instrument pages at /vs/industry-avg/{pair} (59 instruments).

### vs Top 10 Average
- [Overview](https://afterprime.com/vs/top-10-avg) -- Afterprime spread comparison vs top-10 broker average.
- Per-instrument pages at /vs/top-10-avg/{pair} (59 instruments).

### vs Specific Brokers
- [Global Prime](https://afterprime.com/vs/global-prime)
- [Pepperstone](https://afterprime.com/vs/pepperstone)
- [Markets.com](https://afterprime.com/vs/markets-dot-com)
- Per-instrument pages at /vs/{broker}/{pair} (59 instruments x 3 brokers = 177 pages).

## Calculators (11 tools)

Each at /calculators/{tool} -- interactive trading calculators.

- [Compound Growth Calculator](https://afterprime.com/calculators/compound-growth-calculator)
- [Cost Savings Calculator](https://afterprime.com/calculators/cost-savings-calculator)
- [Currency Converter](https://afterprime.com/calculators/currency-converter)
- [Drawdown Calculator](https://afterprime.com/calculators/drawdown-calculator)
- [Margin Calculator](https://afterprime.com/calculators/margin-calculator)
- [Pip Value Calculator](https://afterprime.com/calculators/pip-value-calculator)
- [Position Size Calculator](https://afterprime.com/calculators/position-size-calculator)
- [Profit-Loss Calculator](https://afterprime.com/calculators/profit-loss-calculator)
- [Swap Calculator](https://afterprime.com/calculators/swap-calculator)
- [Trading Calculator](https://afterprime.com/calculators/trading-calculator)
- [Calculators Index](https://afterprime.com/calculators/)
